title: T-060 — QA-015 ccp_deviations page (sign-off + corrective action, parity)
prompt:
# T-060 — QA-015 ccp_deviations page (parity)

PRD: §8.5 traceability + §8.3 QUA-107; §11.5 V-QA-CCP-004; §7.1 09-e-05
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:229-299 (ccp_deviations)

## Goal
Server-rendered CCP deviations browse page with KPI strip + filter bar + table with sign-off + add-corrective-action inline actions + ccp_deviation_log_modal manual entry. 1:1 parity vs prototype.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/app/quality/ccp/deviations/page.tsx (RSC) loads deviations via Drizzle: SELECT FROM haccp_monitoring_records JOIN haccp_ccps JOIN ncr_reports WHERE within_limits=false ORDER BY recorded_at DESC.
2. KPI strip: openCount / actionPending / resolvedToday — aggregated server-side.
3. URL searchParams filter: ?hazard=, ?ccpId=, ?severity=, ?status= (signed/unsigned via signed_at IS NULL), ?dateFrom/dateTo.
4. Table row actions: 'Sign off' (opens T-039 ESignBlock with meaning='witnessed') + 'Add corrective action' (inline Textarea + Server Action updating ccp_deviation_records.corrective_action) + 'Log deviation manually' button at top opens ccp_deviation_log_modal.
5. Hazard badge: shadcn Badge with hazard_type→color map (biological=red, chemical=amber, physical=slate, allergen=red).
6. row-major class for missing corrective_action: server-computed boolean.

## Prototype parity
Anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:229-299` (ccp_deviations).
Parity checklist:
- KPI strip (3 cards)
- Filter bar (hazard/ccp/severity/status/date)
- Table with hazard badge + Sign-off + Add-action inline
- row-major highlight for missing corrective action
- 'Log deviation' top-right opens ccp_deviation_log_modal
- ccp_deviation_log_modal: CCP Select + severity auto-derived + corrective action Textarea (min 10) + linked monitoring record Combobox + conditional ESignBlock

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/ccp/deviations/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ccp/DeviationsTable.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/src/quality/CcpDeviationLogModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ccp/__tests__/Deviations.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:229-299 — parity on structure (KPI strip + filter bar + table + log-deviation modal), visuals (shadcn Table/Badge/Select/Button + hazard color map), interaction (URL searchParam filters + Sign-off opens ESignBlock + inline corrective action Server Action + log modal opens via URL state) — RTL + checklist
2. Given a deviation with corrective_action IS NULL, when row renders, then row-major class (visual emphasis) is applied (server-computed boolean prop)
3. Given user clicks Sign off, when T-039 ESignBlock confirms, then signed_at + signed_by are updated server-side and the row updates without page reload (revalidate or optimistic UI)
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: Deviations.test.tsx asserting parity + row-major highlight + Sign-off ESignBlock open + log modal open before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test Deviations'
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Hazard badge color map driven by DB hazard_type — never hardcode in UI map outside the badge primitive (translation-notes §QA-015)
- Sign-off must use shared ESignBlock T-039
- Do not skip V-QA-CCP-004 check (T-051 owner) — UI is the visible surface but server enforces
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim

pipeline_inputs.description: CCP deviations page (KPI strip + filter bar + table with sign-off + add-corrective-action inline + ccp_deviation_log_modal). 1:1 parity vs prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component loads deviations (haccp_monitoring_records WHERE within_limits=false JOIN haccp_ccps JOIN ncr_reports). KPI strip aggregates open/actionPending/resolvedToday. URL searchParams filter the WHERE clause. Table row inline actions: Sign off (T-039 ESignBlock meaning='witnessed') + Add corrective action (inline Textarea + Server Action). Hazard badge color map: biological=red, chemical=amber, physical=slate, allergen=red. row-major class applied server-computed for corrective_action IS NULL. ccp_deviation_log_modal for manual deviation entry. Anchor: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:229-299.
out_of_scope: Do not modify HACCP Server Actions (T-051) or rule handler (T-052)
Do not implement haccp_deviations table workflows (P2 Epic 8I)
acceptance_criteria: Given the deviations page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:229-299 (ccp_deviations), then it matches on structural parity (KPI strip + filter bar + table + log modal), visual parity (hazard color map from DB + shadcn Table/Badge/Select/Button), interaction parity (URL searchParams + Sign-off ESignBlock + inline corrective action Server Action + log modal via URL state) — RTL + checklist
Given a deviation with corrective_action IS NULL, when the row renders, then row-major class (visual emphasis) is applied based on server-computed boolean prop
Given user clicks Sign off, when T-039 ESignBlock confirms, then signed_at + signed_by are updated server-side and the row updates without full page reload

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
